description: The agent's response accurately reflects the current state of the local demo portfolios, including correct portfolio identifiers, metric values, and position details without hallucination or outdated data.
The response is contextually appropriate to the user's query, addressing the requested portfolio summaries or position details without irrelevant or off-topic information.
The agent appropriately detects ambiguous or incomplete queries and either requests clarification or provides a best-effort answer that acknowledges uncertainty.
The response is clearly presented, unambiguous, and sufficiently detailed to satisfy the user's information needs without unnecessary omission or excessive verbosity.
The agent's responses build user confidence by avoiding misleading information, providing explanations or confidence indicators when appropriate, and supporting actionable insights.
Other important quality factors not covered by listed criteria.
